pi_items.source: Work order description 'Leaking pipe in RM-101' maps to RM-101 in CSV as Finance/FIN-900 (setup_task.sh lines 50 and 16)
Work order description 'Network port installation in RM-103' maps to RM-103 in CSV as Information Technology/IT-550 (setup_task.sh lines 55 and 18)
Work order description 'Light ballast replacement in Main Hallway' references Hallway (not in CSV), therefore uses default code GEN-000 per task instructions (setup_task.sh line 60)
Work order description 'Thermostat adjustment request for RM-102' maps to RM-102 in CSV as Human Resources/HR-200 (setup_task.sh lines 65 and 17)
Work order description 'Executive chair repair in RM-104' maps to RM-104 in CSV as Executive Suite/EXEC-100 (setup_task.sh lines 75 and 19)
Work order WO-BILL-005 description contains 'Warranty repair on HVAC Unit 3' - the word 'Warranty' triggers the skip exception per task instructions (setup_task.sh line 70 and task.json line 5)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves 6 work orders (WO-BILL-001 through WO-BILL-006) with assigned billing codes. Five work orders receive mapped billing codes based on their described locations: WO-BILL-001 (RM-101) receives FIN-900, WO-BILL-002 (RM-103) receives IT-550, WO-BILL-003 (Hallway, not in mapping) receives default code GEN-000, WO-BILL-004 (RM-102) receives HR-200, and WO-BILL-006 (RM-104) receives EXEC-100. Work order WO-BILL-005 contains the word 'Warranty' in its description and must be skipped without modification.
